title: Record denser kept-user budgets and spectacular cron markers

fixtureActions.content:
# Kept User Cron Spectacle Contract

## Kept-user budget
post-compaction kept user message budget defaults to 16k tokens so long sessions reclaim more headroom

## Head tokens
oldest-user head reservation is 1.6k tokens inside the kept-user budget

## Cron spectacle
cron reminder markers use spectacular ambient motion when effects are on

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + handoff/cron vitest + live TUI cron markers
